ai_summary: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Limited (AABL) has launched "Kultur," a hard seltzer, in Madhya Pradesh, marking its strategic entry into India's rapidly expanding hard seltzer and ready-to-drink (RTD) market. This move aligns with AABL's premiumisation strategy, targeting Gen Z and millennial consumers, and positions the company to capitalize on a segment projected for significant growth (10-18% CAGR) with no immediate red flags indicated in the announcement.
